channel.title: Morning Reflections with Rebecca
channel.description: A weekly two hour broadcast of music, devotion, community announcements, and honest conversation from Memphis, Tennessee. Hosted by Board Certified Hospital Chaplain Rebecca Price.
channel.itunes:author: Rebecca Price, BCC

item.title: Discipline and Spiritual Growth
item.description: Return guest Keisha Monroe on practicing discipline as a form of self respect, and how small daily habits become spiritual formation.

item.title: Love as Ministry
item.description: A Valentine reflection with Pastor Evelyn Tate on love as something we practice in our neighborhoods, not only something we feel.

item.title: Chaplaincy in Trauma Settings
item.description: Rev. Cynthia Porter of Regional One Health on presence in the emergency room, and the quiet ministry of staying when there is nothing to fix.

item.title: Advent Hope and Community Light
item.description: Pastor William Greer returns for an Advent conversation about waiting well and carrying light into a hard season.

item.title: A Mother's Faith
item.description: The most requested episode of the year. Dorothy Price shares seventy six years of grace, raised in Memphis and lived out loud.
